name: MJ Hegar Campaign HQ
subject: You need to see this >> FWD: Trump LOVES Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890415/7f51f7bc/4d07f459/4ef045e8/2841291713/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter, you've gotta see this.

Sen. Cornyn voted to acquit the president in a Senate trial without critical witness testimony, now Trump is thanking him for his vote, _and_ Sen. Cornyn is using it to raise money so he can stay in the Senate carrying water for his DC bosses. | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890415/7f51f7bc/4d07f459/4ef045ef/2841291713/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200207.3nd__893__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890415/7f51f7bc/4d07f459/4ef045ef/2841291713/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200207.3nd__893__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
John Cornyn's spinelessness isn't at all Texas, and we've had enough of it. **[Pitch in to show them we're ready to send a Senator with a backbone to fight for us in Washington >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890415/7f51f7bc/4d07f459/4ef045ef/2841291713/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200207.3nd__893__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

\-- Team MJ
\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **John Cornyn**
Date: Fri, Feb 7, 2020 at 12:03 PM
Subject: Trump LOVES Texas
> [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890415/7f51f7bc/4d07f459/4ef045ef/2841291713/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200207.3nd__893__&amount=10&recurring=true")
> ---
> President Trump is FIGHTING for us.
>
> He's ushered in an era of record-low unemployment - not just for workers in general, but also for women and minorities.
>
> He's eliminated threats to democracy and negotiated new trade agreements to put AMERICA FIRST.
>
> He's made America great again... undeterred by the shameful leftist impeachment efforts.
>
> But most important of all, our President loves Texas - and he knows how crucial it is to keep it RED.
> [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890415/7f51f7bc/4d07f459/4ef045ef/2841291713/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200207.3nd__893__&amount=10&recurring=true")
> ---
> The simple truth is, friend, President Trump needs Texas.
>
> Our state is a bastion of conservatism, and without our strong, unwavering support, the president doesn't stand a chance.
>
> After losing impeachment and with an election year in full swing, Democrats are going to spend big to send Trump packing in November... and their strategy begins with flipping Texas.
>
> **President Trump has fought for Texas since the day he took office ... but we need to continue to show him that we are with him all the way into November and beyond.**
>
> **Will you chip in anything you can right now to show President Trump that you won 't stop fighting for him, just like he won't stop fighting for Texas?**
>
> **It doesn 't matter whether it's $1 or $100... President Trump needs to know that we're committed to keeping Texas RED... that Texas will always support him.**
>
> ...and we need to show him our support quickly!
>
> **Will you chip in $25 now?**
>
> - Senator John Cornyn

|
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas

name: Unite the Country
subject: Tonight is the next #DemDebate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [www
body:
#
Peter,
Here we go again -- it's another Democratic Debate night!

We're excited to cheer Joe Biden on at tonight's debate in New Hampshire, just a few days away from Tuesday's First in the Nation primary.

Joe Biden is the candidate who has the best chance at defeating Donald Trump in November. He is the candidate who can unite our country and return integrity and compassion to the White House.

Our team here at Unite the Country will be sharing the best moments during the #DemDebate -- and we need your help to make sure we reach as many voters as possible before votes are cast in New Hampshire on Tuesday.

**Will you help us support Joe Biden tonight?[Follow us on Twitter at @UniteCountryPAC](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76cc/287b9173/2b05c4ab/7e766f85/1712088581/VEsH/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://www.twitter.com/UniteCountryPAC"), retweet the clips & quotes from the debate we share, and tweet your own thoughts about why you're think Joe Biden is the best candidate using the hashtags #UniteForBiden and #DemDebate.**

During the past debates, we shared videos, graphics and quotes of Joe's best moments, and we're excited to do it again tonight. We'll be talking about how Joe is the best candidate to defeat Donald Trump and how Joe will be ready on day one to bring steady leadership back to the White House.

Tune in tonight at 8pm ET and join us on Twitter as we live tweet the #DemDebate!

See you tonight,

Unite the Country

P.S. We are also organizing Joe Biden's supporters online! If you'd like to join our Slack group, please reply to this email.

[](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76cc/287b9173/2b05c4ab/7e766f86/1712088581/VEsE/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://facebook.com/unitethecountrypac") [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76cc/287b9173/2b05c4ab/7e766f87/1712088581/VEsF/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://twitter.com/unitecountrypac") [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76cc/287b9173/2b05c4ab/7e766f80/1712088581/VEsC/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.instagram.com/unitethecountry/")
* * *
Paid for by Unite the Country, [www.unitethecountry.com](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76cc/287b9173/2b05c4ab/7e766f81/1712088581/VEsD/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://www.unitethecountry.com"), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're counting on supporters like you, but if you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76cc/287b9173/2b05c4ab/7e766f82/1712088581/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://https://unitethecountry.cp.bsd.net/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

name: Gary Peters
subject: loyalty
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
No one is above the law - no one, not even the president.
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9fc/5721a3ed/70f48b0b/efb7bf9/4170033288/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friend, my loyalty has always been with the people of Michigan and our country.

That's why I swore to be an impartial juror and to defend our Constitution - so when facts presented over the last few weeks showed that the president put his personal and political interests ahead of our nation, I voted to remove him from office.

**Here 's what it came down to for me: No one is above the law - no one, not even the president.

But it didn't take long for Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump to set their sights on me for my vote - and now, Senate Republicans have announced they will stop at nothing to defeat me.**
I'm not scared of them. I've been in tough fights before, and I won't be intimidated. But the unfortunate truth is that Trump and McConnell are flooding Michigan with millions of dollars to try and ensure that I lose my race.

The good news: Democrats have a real shot at taking back the Senate this year. But if we lose here in Michigan, we also lose any chance to regain control. That means we'll see at least two more years of a Republican Senate covering up Trump's crimes.

I don't have the same network of far-right billionaires and special interests that McConnell and Trump can dispatch at will. But I have grassroots supporters like you, friend.

We set a goal to raise $10,000 to prepare for the onslaught of attacks the GOP has promised are coming our way - unfortunately, we fell a bit short.

Now we're hoping to close the gap. It would mean the world if you could chip in $3 before midnight - here's your secure link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9fc/5721a3ed/70f48b0b/efb7bf8/4170033288/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGszMDYtZnItaW4tbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk306-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**

Thanks for your support,
Gary
| [To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9fc/5721a3ed/70f48b0b/efb7bf7/4170033288/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9fc/5721a3ed/70f48b0b/efb7bf6/4170033288/VEsC/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9fc/5721a3ed/70f48b0b/efb7bf5/4170033288/VEsD/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9fc/5721a3ed/70f48b0b/efb7bf4/4170033288/VEsA/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe from our emails, click [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9fc/5721a3ed/70f48b0b/efb7bf7/4170033288/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [Donate to Gary ->](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9fc/5721a3ed/70f48b0b/efb7bf6/4170033288/VEsO/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") |

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 5 Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
James Madison 1, Nancy Pelosi 0 | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8578391387&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**James Madison 1, Nancy Pelosi 0**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7efb60ed9a&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“A sorry period in Congressional history ended Wednesday with the Senate acquittal of President Trump on two articles of impeachment passed by a partisan and reckless Democratic House. Chalk up one more victory for the Framers of the Constitution, who realized the dangers of political factions and created the Senate to check them,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes.

**🎬** **Watch:** [President Trump holds up the headline: “TRUMP ACQUITTED”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1e95e29d3d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**A Breakdown of Trump’s Most Triumphant Week Yet**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=32c71ceb85&e=3ee4985eea "A Breakdown Of Trump’s Most Triumphant Week Yet")
-_The Federalist_
“Whether one is a Donald Trump supporter or not, it’s impossible to deny this has been one of the best weeks for the Trump presidency ever.” Those successes include record-high approval ratings, a well-received State of the Union address, an expectations-shattering jobs report, and the end of Democrats’ impeachment stunt, Tristan Justice writes.

**More** : [“Record economic optimism under Trump, better than Reagan, Clinton, Obama”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=17ca02d91b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**January Adds a Much Stronger-Than-Expected 225,000 Jobs**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bbbc3496e4&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNBC
The Trump Economy shattered predictions again with 225,000 jobs added last month, beating the 158,000 expected, Jeff Cox reports. “There was more good news for workers: Average hourly earnings rose 3.1% over a year ago.” Wage growth for blue-collar workers outpaced gains for managers—a reversal from the previous administration.

**Boom!**[“Trump’s Manufacturing Jobs Record Is Even Stronger Than We Thought”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8f69b9a136&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**13 Key Takeaways From President Trump’s Epic State Of The Union Address**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=72a68e1e68&e=3ee4985eea "13 Key Takeaways From President Trump’s Epic State Of The Union Address")
-_The Federalist_
“President Donald Trump’s rousing State of the Union address to a divided Congress encouraged his supporters with bold defense of conservative values, overtly reached out to independents on the basis of successful implementation of domestic policy goals, and in so doing enraged the Democrat left on what was already a difficult day for them,” Mollie Hemingway writes.

[5 amazing moments from an unforgettable State of the Union!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ecdb1875d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump, the Developer in Chief, Has a New Way to Fight Poverty**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eb86057a38&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“After more than 50 years, the outdated government-dependency approach to fighting poverty has shown its limits,” writes Tomas Philipson, Acting Chairman of the White House Council of Economic Advisers. That’s why President Trump championed a new antipoverty strategy with his 2017 “Opportunity Zones” tax cuts, which are spurring development and job creation in struggling communities.
---
|

clean_body: James Madison 1, Nancy Pelosi 0 | | | | | FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS | | | -The Wall Street Journal “A sorry period in Congressional history ended Wednesday with the Senate acquittal of President Trump on two articles of impeachment passed by a partisan and reckless Democratic House. Chalk up one more victory for the Framers of the Constitution, who realized the dangers of political factions and created the Senate to check them,” The Wall Street Journal editorial board writes. 🎬 Watch: | | "A Breakdown Of Trump’s Most Triumphant Week Yet" -The Federalist “Whether one is a Donald Trump supporter or not, it’s impossible to deny this has been one of the best weeks for the Trump presidency ever.” Those successes include record-high approval ratings, a well-received State of the Union address, an expectations-shattering jobs report, and the end of Democrats’ impeachment stunt, Tristan Justice writes. More : | | -CNBC The Trump Economy shattered predictions again with 225,000 jobs added last month, beating the 158,000 expected, Jeff Cox reports. “There was more good news for workers: Average hourly earnings rose 3.1% over a year ago.” Wage growth for blue-collar workers outpaced gains for managers—a reversal from the previous administration. Boom! | | "13 Key Takeaways From President Trump’s Epic State Of The Union Address" -The Federalist “President Donald Trump’s rousing State of the Union address to a divided Congress encouraged his supporters with bold defense of conservative values, overtly reached out to independents on the basis of successful implementation of domestic policy goals, and in so doing enraged the Democrat left on what was already a difficult day for them,” Mollie Hemingway writes. | | -Washington Examiner “After more than 50 years, the outdated government-dependency approach to fighting poverty has shown its limits,” writes Tomas Philipson, Acting Chairman of the White House Council of Economic Advisers. That’s why President Trump championed a new antipoverty strategy with his 2017 “Opportunity Zones” tax cuts, which are spurring development and job creation in struggling communities. | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

Hello --
About a minute from now, I'm going to ask you to add a contribution to our grassroots campaign for Senate as part of an emergency fundraising drive we're organizing this week. Let me explain why this is so important:
**Donald Trump announced last night that he 's coming to Colorado to campaign for our opponent Cory Gardner, just days after Gardner stood with Senate Republicans to block firsthand witness testimony and cover-up for the president's abuses of power.**
This is the beginning of a new effort to tear down our campaign, and we're expecting Trump to attack me personally and for those attacks to be amplified by Mitch McConnell's dark money donor network.
We have to fight back today. Trump and McConnell's attack machine is breaking fundraising records left and right, and the only way we can counter them is by collecting as many grassroots donations as possible. So, we've set an ambitious goal of raising $250,000 by tomorrow night, and we need you to make a contribution of any amount to help us get there:
**Can I count on you to make an urgent donation of $10 or more to my campaign right now? I need your support to fight back against whatever Trump and McConnell have planned for our campaign in the coming weeks and months. Thanks in advance: **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Before I take the stage tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7207%2E377263%2Eud4iYw) Yang Gang --

We are moments away from the New Hampshire debate and I keep thinking about your commitment to this movement.

You’ve put your blood, sweat, and tears into making Humanity First a reality. And because of your energy and fight, millions of Americans everywhere are waking up to the idea that they can still get their chance at the American Dream.

The American Dream that leaves no one behind to poverty, homelessness, or scarcity. The American Dream that gives us hope for our future, our kids, and future generations.

It’s because of your dedication that we are going up on the debate stage tonight to remind the world that this American Dream doesn’t have to be lost if we don’t want it to be.

[It would mean a lot to me and, more importantly, to the American people, to send a strong message ahead of the New Hampshire primary on Tuesday. Yang Gang, will you pitch in $10 or more now toward our $2 million goal?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24836?t=5&akid=7207%2E377263%2Eud4iYw)

You have a stake in this movement just as much as I do. And I can’t stress enough how make-or-break this primary on Tuesday will be for the future of this campaign. Let’s keep pushing.

Proud to be your candidate,

-Andrew | **We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24836?t=6&akid=7207%2E377263%2Eud4iYw)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=7207%2E377263%2Eud4iYw) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=7207%2E377263%2Eud4iYw) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2020 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

>
With the New Hampshire primary just four days away, this debate couldn't come at a more critical time. Because believe it or not, our organizers and volunteers are still finding voters who haven't decided who they'll support on Tuesday.

**We've set a $2 million goal to fully fund our organizing, advertising, and voter outreach programs to make sure as many people as possible know about Elizabeth's vision for big, structural change before Tuesday's primary.**

And unlike other candidates in the race, Elizabeth won't rely on a Super PAC to swoop in and put ads on the air. Only you and grassroots donors like you have the power to help our campaign hit this goal.

**[When Elizabeth gets off the debate stage, we'll let her know how many new grassroots donations we've received toward our $2 million New Hampshire fundraising goal. | Hey, team - [can you chip in $5 to Michael Bennet's campaign?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa99/134673f2/37eaa563/69973b8a/2049164377/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B3_020720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

We hate to be so direct, but there are only four days until the New Hampshire primary, and we need your support now more than ever.

The polls have been wrong since day one, and as candidates falter, voters in New Hampshire are looking to Michael. Our campaign is surging in the Granite State!

[We've set an ambitious goal of raising $100,000 by Tuesday, and we are getting closer and closer every day!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa99/134673f2/37eaa563/69973b8a/2049164377/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B3_020720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Together we're building a grassroots movement to unite the country, beat the most corrupt president in American history, and root out the corruption that got him to the White House in the first place. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ad01/45c30650/1fb0dc8ac/66e207ae/3426790940/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Here's the way I see it: The way we build a democracy going forward is not with billionaires reaching into their own pockets. Or with candidates sucking up to billionaires to fund their campaigns, or Super PACs to float their campaign.

The way we build it going forward is building a movement funded from the grassroots up. That's the way I'm running this campaign.

**[If you think it's the right way, please pitch in $2 or whatever you can right now to our grassroots movement and help our campaign reach our goal before the New Hampshire primary.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ad01/45c30650/1fb0dc8ac/66e20791/3426790940/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU80MUZfREVCX1RZRV9FXzIwMjAwMjA3X1YyUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO41F_DEB_TYE_E_20200207_V2S1_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
Every single candidate on the debate stage tonight except for Amy Klobuchar and me is either a self-funding billionaire, or is receiving help from Super PACs that can dump unlimited spending into this primary.

**To me, that's not how you build a campaign that fights for working people.**

Together we're building a grassroots movement to unite the country, beat the most corrupt president in American history, and root out the corruption that got him to the White House in the first place.

**But our next big task is hitting our fundraising goal before the New Hampshire primary on Tuesday. I'm not going to lean on a Super PAC or beg a handful of wealthy donors to help hit this goal, so I'm asking you:**

**[Can I count on you to make your first donation right now to help hit this powerfully important goal? name: Team Yang
subject: After the debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We’re facing a cold reality

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7256%2E377263%2EDD1BGD) Yang Gang --

Andrew just stepped off the New Hampshire debate stage where he delivered a strong, data-driven, and impassioned response to every question -- no surprise there.

But here’s the cold reality: If we don’t raise $2 million by Monday at midnight and get a top finish here in New Hampshire, there might not be another debate with Andrew’s voice.

**[Don’t let this be the last time Andrew is on the national stage. Contribute $10 or more toward our goal:](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24890?t=5&akid=7256%2E377263%2EDD1BGD)** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24890?t=6&akid=7256%2E377263%2EDD1BGD)
---
New Hampshire is filled with independent and strong-principled voters. We cannot lose our chance to reach as many as we can before Tuesday. But that’s up to you, Yang Gang.

**[Pitch in $10 or more toward our $2 million goal and send Andrew into the New Hampshire primary on a big wave.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24890?t=7&akid=7256%2E377263%2EDD1BGD)**

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24890?t=8&akid=7256%2E377263%2EDD1BGD)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=7256%2E377263%2EDD1BGD) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=7256%2E377263%2EDD1BGD) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

Dear Friend, Much of our dialogue about the Trump administration still contains an undertone of disbelief. As if to say, "he didn't even win the popular vote how can he think he can do such things?!" Whatever you think of Mr. Trump, he is arguably the most authentic politician of our times. We all knew what he would do if elected. The nearly 63 million of our fellow Americans who voted for him weren't conned. They voted for him to do __exactly__ what he is doing - turning it all upside down. Why? Because Congress has become so dysfunctional and subservient that it has failed entirely to solve the very real kitchen table problems with health care, economic security, immigration and infrastructure that so many millions face despite a strong economy. Policy, now more than ever, is enacted through executive order, rather than through legislation crafted by Congress. It's time to restore Congress to a functioning, co-equal branch of government focused on solving the problems of the American people. I pledge to you that if elected, my loyalty will be to the country, the Constitution, and my constituents. Not the party or the president - _whoever_ that may be. Help me get there. **[Drop a donation so we can reach as many voters as possible in the coming weeks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14776728/155290335/-1907457918?refcode=02032020_em_fr_tk_b1_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGZhYzU1NS04NDRhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cd8p4V1SYOXwf-qXMoKXkpyDRfmBuANDqQ2tVotHY5A=) **And most of all, get out there and VOTE! | [$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14776729/155290336/1282640063?refcode=02032020_em_fr_tk_b1_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGZhYzU1NS04NDRhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cd8p4V1SYOXwf-qXMoKXkpyDRfmBuANDqQ2tVotHY5A=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14776730/155290337/1282640063?refcode=02032020_em_fr_tk_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGZhYzU1NS04NDRhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cd8p4V1SYOXwf-qXMoKXkpyDRfmBuANDqQ2tVotHY5A=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14776731/155290338/1282640063?refcode=02032020_em_fr_tk_b1_all&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGZhYzU1NS04NDRhLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cd8p4V1SYOXwf-qXMoKXkpyDRfmBuANDqQ2tVotHY5A=)

clean_body: | = Dear Friend, Much of our dialogue about the Trump administration still contains an undertone of disbelief. As if to say, "he didn't even win the popular vote how can he think he can do such things?!" Whatever you think of Mr. Trump, he is arguably the most authentic politician of our times. We all knew what he would do if elected. The nearly 63 million of our fellow Americans who voted for him weren't conned. They voted for him to do exactly what he is doing - turning it all upside down. Why? Because Congress has become so dysfunctional and subservient that it has failed entirely to solve the very real kitchen table problems with health care, economic security, immigration and infrastructure that so many millions face despite a strong economy. Policy, now more than ever, is enacted through executive order, rather than through legislation crafted by Congress. It's time to restore Congress to a functioning, co-equal branch of government focused on solving the problems of the American people. I pledge to you that if elected, my loyalty will be to the country, the Constitution, and my constituents. Not the party or the president - whoever that may be. Help me get there. = And most of all, get out there and VOTE! | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you, Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: Team Tuberville
subject: FWD: We’re on the road... and I need your help!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
See Coach’s message & respond today! Tap or click HERE >>>
Peter,

Did you see Coach’s message? If you missed it, you can read it below.

This is a vital effort... and we need EVERY supporter to step up now to help!

We’ve hit the road to connect directly with voters and rally conservatives across Alabama. **This remains a neck and neck race... and while Jeff Sessions is turning to his D.C. SWAMP pals for help, we’re counting on grassroots conservatives like YOU!**

Voters have a clear choice: Do we want an establishment career politician representing Alabama in the U.S. Senate... or a tough, no-nonsense outsider like Coach?

subject: President Donald J. Trump
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
Did you catch President Trump's State of the Union Address? If not, I encourage you to check it out. Even in the face of the greatest political witch hunt in American history, President Donald J. Trump once again delivers on his promise to put America First.
I am fighting alongside our President to win in November 2020 and rid Washington of the Liberal Elites who are desperate to rig this upcoming election. Neither President Trump nor I are going to be able to do this alone. We rely on grassroots supporters like yourself; that is why I am asking you to help by donating $100, $50, or even just $25 today.
---

Enough is enough - it is time for a change. I am fighting to re-ignite the energy in the PA-7th District by putting Lehigh Valley's interests first and supporting President Donald J. Trump's agenda.
Will you support me in this battle? By donating to my campaign today you will send a message to Rep. Susan Wild that we plan on winning in November! Please consider chipping in $100, $50, or even just $25 today.

---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ucGbKUYn9_o8gjObjy5GHO0BOKNgxE3o8Te0OWPO2MuIfP9RAC5SLA0CXYjE2dyatqFewNJflceuzKohH4JbO4RV8g9E8mJHGvOIe6VJ5aK4XCffBZeArmATrWW-WAk6nyGMbfzoG5R3nMIRgaQymSnyfki_p2ihoXxNZmQvkUmxTUdXHFWsSQ==&c=8diX--2EWBP6qAL3cOGxjKf3d7C5zPctksncEOOX9hnKqta3LeKeDQ==&ch=sGOsxVh6oO0zaZgt90wiJuezSSf5W3_PSmoZ_FumP0VVXtn52jt5KQ==)
---
| I look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail!
---
| For Freedom,
---
|

| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07

name: Mark Warner
subject: After impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The best thing we can put our energy toward now is beating Donald Trump, flipping the Senate, and keeping Virginia blue this November.
|
---
| | Derek --

I know a lot of folks are feeling frustrated, maybe even discouraged after the Senate voted to acquit the President without a full, fair trial. I understand that feeling, but I'm here to tell you that we cannot lose hope. I just recorded a short video message about what comes next, and I hope you'll watch it. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d62a/53d9897e/5373d8b5/1c89b25c/4105458360/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ2NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-video?refcode=20200208_f_1_nd__464__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: I Need Your Help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica for US
body:
Dear Supporter,
When I last shared with you, I was excited about the multiple endorsements received by my campaign. Well, guess what?...That wasn't the end of it! Since then, my campaign has humbly earned **_EVEN MORE ENDORSEMENTS_.** Here's a listing of the latest:
* **Congressional Black Caucus (CBCPAC)**
* **Higher Heights for America (HHAPAC)**
* **Charlotte Black Political Caucus (BPC)**
* **George C. Simkins Jr. Memorial PAC (Simkins PAC)**
* **Wake County Voter Education Coalition (WCVEC)**

**Our campaign is doing well, but I still need your help.** You may have recently heard about the apparent Republican interference by the Faith and Power PAC with a $1.6 million ad-buy in the Democratic Senate Primary here in North Carolina. Please be aware that the Erica For US campaign disavows and disassociates ourselves from this entity as I have not authorized them to represent my views or positions in any media format. In addition:
* To those pondering the false premise that the apparent Republican-led interference is evidence that the Republicans believe I am not the strongest candidate in the Democratic Primary, I have just one question: _why am I leading in every *independent poll of this election cycle; seven of seven polls?_(*excludes polls where the president of the polling company is an endorser AND max donor of my primary challenger - check the fine print in the recent PPP poll)

* To those pondering the rumor the Republicans are supporting me because Thom Tillis thinks he has a better chance of beating me in the General Election, I have just one question: _when was the last time Thom Tillis was right about anything?_ To include his stance on allowing the Trump Administration to strip funding from military families and bases in North Carolina to divert funds to an ornamental border wall? His stance on Impeachment? His stance on conviction on the Articles of Impeachment?

I took the pledge to not accept corporate-PAC donations, nor the assistance of corporate-funded PACs, but please realize my campaign still needs money to operate for success. **Please contribute to my campaign because I want to raise money the right way to fund my message, activities, and advertising. **My leadership in honoring this commitment in full should catalyze a movement in North Carolina toward more fair and free elections. I urge all candidates running for office, regardless of party affiliation or position on the ballot, to reject corporate PAC donations. Every citizen of North Carolina deserves an equal vote that is not tainted by corporate interests. **Donate to help me defend my campaign!**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/CFQ8RASwHkFiqIg3QjYlv0bgtegEa9oSrKnEq_oGj2o=/jvpleJt0x2odNIn2KW88Ppdtn4eb-CwMTVlI47qLuk4=)

I have spent every single day of the last year campaigning, talking to the voters across the state. I have been astronomically outraised by my primary opponent who has attempted to unfairly mute the voices of North Carolina's voters with DC influence and a Corporate-funded SuperPAC. With your donation, you are ensuring that the voices of North Carolinians will be heard loud and clear in support of my campaign. Our victory will be on the strength of our shoe leather and our inclusive and expanded vision as we drive to flip the US Senate in 2020. **Please contribute today. Give as much as you can!**
**I remain unbought, unbossed, and unapologetic in my 17 years of advocating for the people and not the plutocracy.**

#EricaForUS

www.ericaforus.com

[ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/CFQ8RASwHkFiqIg3QjYlv0bgtegEa9oSrKnEq_oGj2o=/jvpleJt0x2odNIn2KW88Ppdtn4eb-CwMTVlI47qLuk4=)
{{Authorized and Paid for by Erica for US .}}
{{Erica For US P.O. Box 1236 Gaston, North Carolina 27832}}
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/CFQ8RASwHkFiqIg3QjYlv0bgtegEa9oSrKnEq_oGj2o=/vtEKpLoYgV5JJy-Pq0QxE2lBHFWiWNTQYHeTOiBRPbI=).

Since then, my campaign has humbly earned EVEN MORE ENDORSEMENTS. Here's a listing of the latest: Congressional Black Caucus (CBCPAC) Higher Heights for America (HHAPAC) Charlotte Black Political Caucus (BPC) George C. Simkins Jr. Memorial PAC (Simkins PAC) Wake County Voter Education Coalition (WCVEC) Our campaign is doing well, but I still need your help. You may have recently heard about the apparent Republican interference by the Faith and Power PAC with a $1.6 million ad-buy in the Democratic Senate Primary here in North Carolina. Please be aware that the Erica For US campaign disavows and disassociates ourselves from this entity as I have not authorized them to represent my views or positions in any media format. In addition: To those pondering the false premise that the apparent Republican-led interference is evidence that the Republicans believe I am not the strongest candidate in the Democratic Primary, I have just one question: why am I leading in every independent poll of this election cycle; seven of seven polls?(excludes polls where the president of the polling company is an endorser AND max donor of my primary challenger - check the fine print in the recent PPP poll) To those pondering the rumor the Republicans are supporting me because Thom Tillis thinks he has a better chance of beating me in the General Election, I have just one question: when was the last time Thom Tillis was right about anything? To include his stance on allowing the Trump Administration to strip funding from military families and bases in North Carolina to divert funds to an ornamental border wall? His stance on Impeachment? His stance on conviction on the Articles of Impeachment? I took the pledge to not accept corporate-PAC donations, nor the assistance of corporate-funded PACs, but please realize my campaign still needs money to operate for success. Please contribute to my campaign because I want to raise money the right way to fund my message, activities, and advertising. My leadership in honoring this commitment in full should catalyze a movement in North Carolina toward more fair and free elections. I urge all candidates running for office, regardless of party affiliation or position on the ballot, to reject corporate PAC donations. Every citizen of North Carolina deserves an equal vote that is not tainted by corporate interests. Donate to help me defend my campaign! = I have spent every single day of the last year campaigning, talking to the voters across the state. I have been astronomically outraised by my primary opponent who has attempted to unfairly mute the voices of North Carolina's voters with DC influence and a Corporate-funded SuperPAC. With your donation, you are ensuring that the voices of North Carolinians will be heard loud and clear in support of my campaign. Our victory will be on the strength of our shoe leather and our inclusive and expanded vision as we drive to flip the US Senate in 2020. Please contribute today. Give as much as you can! I remain unbought, unbossed, and unapologetic in my 17 years of advocating for the people and not the plutocracy.** #EricaForUS www.ericaforus.com = {{Authorized and Paid for by Erica for US .}} {{Erica For US P.O. Box 1236 Gaston, North Carolina 27832}} If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

Peter,

I have seen the **HORRORS** of socialism firsthand.

_**First,**_ as the daughter of Cuban refugees who fled Communist Cuba, my parents warned me of the DESTRUCTION of Castro’s Communist Regime.

_**Then,**_ as a journalist, I devoted my entire career to EXPOSING oppressive, socialist regimes all throughout Latin America.

_**Today,**_ I see more and more politicians in the United States supporting socialist policies under the guise of _**“Democratic Socialism”**_. >
We're running out of time -- the New Hampshire primary is just three days away. And unlike other candidates in the race, Elizabeth isn't a self-funding billionaire or receiving help from Super PACs that can dump unlimited spending into this primary.

She isn't selling her time to billionaires in swanky penthouses, exclusive mansions, or anywhere at all in exchange for large donations. She doesn't have a Super PAC to prop up the campaign's advertising program.

Elizabeth won't take money from Washington lobbyists, corporate PACs, or executives from big banks, big tech, or big oil companies.

Not all the other candidates can say the same.

**Since last night's debate, thousands of people have stepped up across the country and said that they believe in how we're running this campaign -- that they're in this fight for big, structural change. And we need thousands more to do the same today to hit our New Hampshire fundraising goal.**

**[Can Elizabeth Warren count on you and your support during this critical time? Chip in $2 or whatever you can to help hit our goal and fund this grassroots movement for big, structural change before the New Hampshire primary.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ad13/45c30650/1f8edc408/66e20025/407483768/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU80NEZfREVCX09VVF9UXzIwMjAwMjA4X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO44F_DEB_OUT_T_20200208_V1S2_P")**

Team Warren

name: Sara Gideon
subject: This was not the process that Americans deserved -- and Senator Collins was complicit in letting it happen.
body:
I will always be completely honest with my supporters.

[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802936/4bef7a87/6d5d3574/287fbddd/3686437915/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDgtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200208-1-a")

Friends,
I will always be completely honest with my team:
**Based on the information that has come out of the impeachment trial, I believe an abuse of power occurred -- and I would have voted to remove President Trump.**
Like most Mainers, I believe we needed to hear from relevant witnesses and consider all the evidence as part of this process. I also believe that, if President Trump and Mitch McConnell were really convinced of his innocence, they would have allowed witnesses to testify.
This was not the process that Americans deserved -- and Senator Collins was complicit in letting it happen. She voted _twelve times_ to block witness testimony and critical evidence, and without hearing from a single witness, she still voted to acquit President Trump.
And it gets worse: Collins tried to justify her vote by saying Trump had learned a "pretty big lesson" from the impeachment trial. I don't buy it. I know you don't either. Donald Trump himself responded hours later saying he hadn't learned a thing.
Despite her attempts to find political cover and appear like she's standing up to Donald Trump, this process has been yet another example of just how much Senator Collins has changed.
When it really counts, Senator Collins will stand with Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump -- not the people she represents.
Mainers and Americans deserve better. That's why I'm running against Susan Collins for U.S. Senate and why I'm asking you now:
**[Will you make a $3 contribution to support my campaign today? I wouldn't ask if it wasn't really important.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802936/4bef7a87/6d5d3574/287fbddd/3686437915/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDgtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200208-1-a")**
Look, we're not just going up against Senator Collins in this race. We're going up against Mitch McConnell, national Republican donors, and massive special interest groups and corporate PACs who will spend whatever it takes to preserve the status quo.
It's going to take a large grassroots team to beat them. I can't do it alone. So are you with me?
All my best,
Sara Gideon
**[Make a $3 contribution now if you want to defeat Susan Collins, take back the Senate for Democrats, and kick Mitch McConnell OUT as Majority Leader.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802936/4bef7a87/6d5d3574/287fbddd/3686437915/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDgtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200208-1-a")**
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802936/4bef7a87/6d5d3574/287fbddd/3686437915/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDgtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200208-1-a")**********

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802936/4bef7a87/6d5d3574/287fbddc/3686437915/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802936/4bef7a87/6d5d3574/287fbdd3/3686437915/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802936/4bef7a87/6d5d3574/287fbdd2/3686437915/VEsB/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

body:

Pete Buttigieg announced he has raised over $2.7 million since the Iowa caucuses. That means we need to catch up with his fundraising if we want the chance to compete in New Hampshire over the next four days.

**[Can you contribute $10 or more right now so we can catch up and close the fundraising gap?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24913?t=5&akid=7263%2E377263%2EqRsi0v)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24913?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=7263%2E377263%2EqRsi0v)

Team Yang

We can't let that happen, Friend.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Only a dentist can fix this Congress--here's how.
body:
I've never seen a case this bad. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=795c6d9796&u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=5f8930d303)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=f6b0a84c1b&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [HELP US GET IT DONE](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=b994ef40a6&e=795c6d9796 "HELP US GET IT DONE")
---
| Peter, Congress needs a root canal.

As you know, I spent years as a dentist and saw first-hand some awful cases. Kids who never brushed their teeth, ate tons of candy, and drank more soda than water.

But even the worst cavities I saw pale in comparison to the rot that has taken root in Congress.

The partisan Democrats are do-nothing, impeachment-crazed socialists who have no productive solutions for our country. Radicals like Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and Kendra Horn have turned the institution into a weapon against President Trump and his supporters.

That's why we need to elect a bold conservative to beat Kendra Horn in November and give Congress the **root canal** it so rightly deserves.

[**Will you help us power our campaign by donating just $5, $15, $25, $50, or even $100 so that we can have all the tools we need to get the job done?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=82a25dadb8&e=795c6d9796) [**QUICK DONATE $5 >>>>
QUICK DONATE $15 >>>>
QUICK DONATE $25 >>>>
QUICK DONATE $50 >>>>
QUICK DONATE $100 >>>>**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=293607f5a9&e=795c6d9796)
We have to band together and fight so that we can keep the American Dream alive for our kids and grandkids. Failure isn't an option and neither is inaction which is why I'm putting my name on the line to fight for our shared conservative values.

[**Please consider donating just a few dollars to help us fight back against the radical left, fix the broken institution Congress has become, and give President Trump a true ally in Congress.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=62cbdb115a&e=795c6d9796)

Thank you.

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=858da9b2a0&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi
---

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: How we win big
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Minnesota is one of the most important states in the 2020 election.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200208-amy?refcode=em200208-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") **_Will you split a donation between Senator Tina Smith's re-election campaign and my campaign for president?
[Let's win big in 2020 >>](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200208-amy?refcode=em200208-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10")_** Hi -- Minnesota is one of the most important states in the 2020 election. Here's why:

1\. Donald Trump came within 1.5 points of winning Minnesota in 2016 and if he wins the state in 2020, he will likely secure a second term.

2\. My friend Tina Smith is up for re-election, Mitch McConnell's billionaire donor network has made her a top target and **Donald Trump has handpicked her GOP opponent.** If they defeat her it's very unlikely Democrats can flip the Senate.

Tina and I are out there every day taking on America's biggest challenges and bringing people together around the issues that matter to families.

That's how we'll win -- but we can't do it alone:

**I'm asking you to split a contribution between Tina's re-election campaign and my presidential campaign. Help us take on Donald Trump and make sure Democrats win in Minnesota and around the country this November:** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200208-amy?refcode=em200208-amy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

subject: Surprise!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Another Democratic Debate in the books. Another win for Donald Trump. Socialism has no place in America. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/67957631cff2/this-is-completely-ridiculous-6223213?e=1050d051da)
---
| | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=040c79a63b&e=1050d051da)
---
| | |
# Surprise!
Democrats have officially
embraced socialism

Did you watch the Democratic debate last night? Probably not, and we don't blame you. The biggest surprise is that _**Bernie has convinced all of the other Democratic candidates to embrace socialism. **_

_**The biggest winner was, once again, President Trump.**_

With Democrats up and down the ballot embracing socialism, it's more important than ever that we Take Back the House. President Trump needs reinforcements in D.C. so he can get some actual work done.

[Will you chip in to help send a conservative fighter to stand with President Trump? Anything helps: $100, $50, or even $10.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=449c484a64&e=1050d051da)

_**We need to show the Democrats we will not stand for socialism!**_
---
| [Chip in Now](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=05e1c4ace2&e=1050d051da "Chip in Now")
---
| We need to put a stop to this socialist agenda, and [it is time for Republicans to take back the majority in the House and show Nancy the door.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=26ccfb4395&e=1050d051da)

We'd love to have you join our campaign to send Jake LaTurner to Congress as a true conservative who has the backbone to fight socialism.

President Trump needs an army of allies in the House and the Senate to help him keep the momentum he has started and continue to add more jobs, improve trade, secure our borders, and keep America great!

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner

name: Team Marsha Majority Defenders
subject: About last night...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
If you believe the best is yet to come, that socialism is evil, that America has potential that has yet to be unleashed, President Trump needs you to take action.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDE3MzczMDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDY5MzI3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
****
****

__**\- Marsha for Senate Majority Defenders -**

Earlier this week, in the first in the nation contest for the presidential race in the Iowa Caucuses, Democrats walked away bruised and embarrassed. Their caucus reporting FAILED while Republicans declared President Trump their winner within hours. Today, FIVE DAYS after the caucuses, _**there is still no declared Democratic winner in Iowa.**_

And especially after last night's Democratic debate in New Hampshire, where there was more of the same mud slinging and one-upping, it's clear there won't be one for quite some time.

It's been over a year on the campaign trail for some of these candidates, hosting town halls, meet and greets and debates, and STILL, there is no clear frontrunner. **The Left cannot decide which radical candidate 's policies they prefer more.**

Meanwhile, **conservatives are coalescing around President Trump and one of the best records in modern history**. _Just yesterday morning, it was announced that the economy added 225,000 new jobs in January_ \-- that's more than 67,000 jobs than what was projected! Not only that, but the labor force participation rate AND average hourly earnings both increased last month.

**Under President Trump 's leadership, America is getting back to work and thriving -- there has truly never been a better time to live in America!**

Despite all of this success, the National Democratic machine has President Trump and conservatives in their crosshairs, willing to do whatever and spend whatever to prevent more progress on the Republican agenda.

It's up to proud patriots like you, Peter, to join millions of Americans in coming together defend the White House and help strengthen our conservative Senate Majority.

**CAN WE COUNT YOU IN?**
_Make a contribution right now to Stand with President Trump_ __

_****_
**[**DONATE NOW >>>**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDE3MzczMDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDY5MzI3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
---

The yelling and fighting and exchange of radical progressive policies on the stage last night made it very clear that the Left is not only unprepared to lead the greatest country on earth, but they're also unfit to lead.

If you support growing the economy, getting Americans back to work, protecting the unborn, securing the border and the idea that we are one Nation, under God, indivisible, with liberty and justice for all, **President Trump needs you to step up today to defend the future of our great nation.**

If you believe the best is yet to come, that socialism is evil, that America has potential that has yet to be unleashed, **President Trump needs you to take action. **

_Join us today in ensuring that our conservative values continue to prevail by standing with President Trump and protecting the conservative Senate Majority!_

**[CHIP IN $100](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDE3MzczMDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDY5MzI3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

Just days after Cory Gardner covered for the president and blocked firsthand witnesses, **Trump is thanking him by coming to Colorado to attack us.**
Last year, the president vowed to do everything possible to help his chosen candidate -- and now it's clear he's making good on that promise.
Trump has already raised $100,000 to support Gardner's re-election bid and pledged to campaign "a lot" for him in the coming months. **We need to fight back!**
**Rush a donation of $10 or more before midnight to help us defy Trump and flip Colorado 's Senate seat. Anything you can give will allow us to have the resources to respond to incoming attacks immediately.**

name: Tom Steyer
subject: It’s the economy, stupid
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
After last night’s debate, here’s the hard truth: _**We're going to have to take Donald Trump down on the economy. **_ That’s what I said last night, and I meant it. Every single day, Trump is crowing about the economy, and he's going to beat us unless we can take him on. It’s like the Clinton campaign in 1992 said over and over again: **It’s the economy, stupid. ** That's the issue. It's not about who has the best health care plan. All the Democratic health care plans are a million times better than anything coming out of the Republican Party. The question is, who can go toe to toe with Mr. Trump and beat him? Because he's the real threat to the country — and our candidate must have the experience to take him down.
---
| [Ready to beat Trump?](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=M5l2K6CF-2BTeSi2jZtEX6WDq0JgL4SZ9fws6CW-2B-2BU1P01xbj6EyZD4VLtzX-2BFrvN-2FGr0DazM7bD3Jbxrp4rqlSZbKqg1T4tKiEcIwaJNRqIh40sCDXvE0LnIgQPqyeB4HqEr586TmQsS5kYBdbRgHIbbgVWz53oPSXqLu9pti1-2F8vn6Tx7s8rypZiBGrahIqiRNaGHsbEN8xKDo9OKJqJaCRtSiIk-2BZDZRLZsjR6qAlE-3DrIhv_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjI06VISPfJIPkjxFld-2BrrlsLfWBgSznyC9eEQeuE67ByW7-2F4rW5t238CYEo3QD0YcxPTKhWxg64EQpjsVY-2BTSgwxArtJemEttgIaKUdpjXsCAyE5ZwPkaURG31-2BPJ7r2TW6HP3gqxMcg0geGF4OHOgsha9nmD601VJ-2FVsQ-2B6Gl5AyUPwd8K7-2BwG2iZ6pvBNpz2WDmOZD2jBnl57L5Ze-2FW7lBixoc4RG0OESSRI7Dd6lIsyqMuNZ5C2dqG9pUCbN7Z95Kb91gVyNkOyR1uWNzQSmFHUz2SX9oBWGl6P-2Bqkd8qZtnjGfFQMNy3Sm3wQsvrot3XxU3fia84wS7JXPE33P5d-2Bw25KIqwvwukAyGYN3kegbXDmrGb5aMLkO2LggCtjEOzUf58b1wDEK60c8x4TtprHEaRvwYGv8ScS-2BvG8BVA-3D-3D)
---
I’ve built a successful business, started a bank to support marginalized communities, and stood with communities to fight back against big corporations. I know what works, and I know that Trump’s “economy” isn't working for the people — it’s only working for the wealthy. We have to get this incompetent president out of the White House as soon as possible. clean_body: | | | | After last night’s debate, here’s the hard truth: We're going to have to take Donald Trump down on the economy. That’s what I said last night, and I meant it. Every single day, Trump is crowing about the economy, and he's going to beat us unless we can take him on. It’s like the Clinton campaign in 1992 said over and over again: It’s the economy, stupid. That's the issue. It's not about who has the best health care plan. All the Democratic health care plans are a million times better than anything coming out of the Republican Party. The question is, who can go toe to toe with Mr. Trump and beat him? Because he's the real threat to the country — and our candidate must have the experience to take him down. | I’ve built a successful business, started a bank to support marginalized communities, and stood with communities to fight back against big corporations. I know what works, and I know that Trump’s “economy” isn't working for the people — it’s only working for the wealthy. We have to get this incompetent president out of the White House as soon as possible. — Tom | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! Cuts to Social Security are coming.........if Donald Trump and the GOP have their way.

_In fact, every Trump budget since 2017 has included deep, painful cuts to Social Security. Only public outrage and action by elected Democrats have prevented it from happening._

[That is why we need your help NOW -- with the impeachment "trial" over we know Trump and the GOP will come after Social Security (and more) in an effort to fire up their base.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4087/4bd7760e/471b4d72/77ac5740/2859920498/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/protect-social-security?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+That+is+why+we+need+your+help+NOW+mdash+&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200208_6MO_1WAT-1MC-1MO_SEG_1_SocialSec-Opround4&source=314_EM_PT_200208_6MO_1WAT-1MC-1MO_SEG_1_SocialSec-Opround4")

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4087/4bd7760e/471b4d72/77ac574c/2859920498/VEsA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200208_6MO_1WAT-1MC-1MO_SEG_1_SocialSec-Opround4&source=314_EM_PT_200208_6MO_1WAT-1MC-1MO_SEG_1_SocialSec-Opround4")** to make a donation.

name: Team MJ
subject: How Senator Cornyn compares
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
This race is a question of integrity, service, and Texas values like strength and independence.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890417/7f51f7bc/4d1a63d5/4ef0465d/4044223351/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter,

We want to tell you in detail why replacing Sen. Cornyn with MJ Hegar in November matters so much. But if you already know the reasons and are ready to pitch in to support MJ's campaign, **[you can do that here.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890417/7f51f7bc/4d1a63d5/4ef04653/4044223351/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200208.2nd__873__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**This race is a question of integrity, service, and Texas values like strength and independence.

MJ has dedicated her entire life to service.**
* A combat search and rescue pilot in the Air Force, she went head to head with the Taliban in Afghanistan.
* Then, she took on the Pentagon to overturn the Ground Combat Exclusion Rule that barred women from ground combat jobs.
* **Now, she's the only political outsider in Texas' Senate race.** She's a working mom who has actually faced the struggles many Texans do, and she's not accepting a dime from corporate PACs. **[That means she needs you -- will you donate today to send MJ to the Senate?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890417/7f51f7bc/4d1a63d5/4ef04653/4044223351/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200208.2nd__873__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**Sen. Cornyn, on the other hand?**
* **First** , he worked his way up in the political establishment in Texas.
* **Then** , he spent nearly two decades in Washington selling Texans out to the special interests and his DC bosses -- like when he voted to repeal health care protections _eighteen times._
* **Now** , he's running for reelection with an over $12 million war chest heavily funded by special interests, **with outside groups _already_ boosting him and spending millions on ads.**

**The choice couldn't be clearer:** a working mom and combat veteran who has lived her values, or an entrenched establishment politician who takes his marching orders from the special interests and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell. **Are you with MJ?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Our path forward now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7264%2E377263%2Epc9cAv) Yang Gang --

I’m a numbers guy, that’s why I have to be frank with you right now.

It’s been a tough week and it’s now or never. Looking at the polls we have to push now to have a chance to finish in the top 4 in New Hampshire and give our campaign the boost it needs.

We thought after Iowa we would see a big bump in fundraising and support. But even though we finished better than the polls expected, the confusion and failure to see results for days has hurt our narrative and our fundraising.

**[We’re going all-in over the next few days with our resources, staff, and time for a top finish in New Hampshire -- and setting a fundraising goal of $2 million by the night before the primary, February 10. Will you give $10 or more now so I can go all-in and contend for the top 4 here?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24939?t=5&akid=7264%2E377263%2Epc9cAv)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24939?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=7264%2E377263%2Epc9cAv)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24939?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=7264%2E377263%2Epc9cAv)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24939?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=7264%2E377263%2Epc9cAv)
---
| | [$100 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24939?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=7264%2E377263%2Epc9cAv)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24939?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=7264%2E377263%2Epc9cAv)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24939?t=11&amount=25&akid=7264%2E377263%2Epc9cAv)
---
If we miss this fundraising goal and our target finish in New Hampshire, I don’t believe we can continue contending at the same level. It’s that simple.

We’ve been driven to this situation by many problems. But the core is that our politics is broken and completely owned by the establishment and special interests.

Two billionaires are waging an ad war. A senior advisor this week on another campaign tweeted out instructions to a super PAC supporting his candidate. Is this democracy? Is this what the Democratic Party should be all about?

I don’t think so. That’s why I got in this race instead of sitting back and just being disgusted. And I know it’s why you’re here too. To stop making every single thing about money and special interests, and instead bring back some humanity to our economy and our politics.

That said, I also have to look at the reality of this race and what all indicators point to is that without a big jump in fundraising and support in the next few days, it is extremely challenging for a non-establishment, outsider candidate like me to compete.

**[I wish this was not the case, but I do believe New Hampshire is our last chance to break out. So, I’m asking you to give like you never have before. Contribute $10 or more now. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24939?t=12&akid=7264%2E377263%2Epc9cAv)**

Counting on you,

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24939?t=13&akid=7264%2E377263%2Epc9cAv)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=7264%2E377263%2Epc9cAv) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=7264%2E377263%2Epc9cAv) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2020 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

name: Progressive Majority
subject: Trump's abortion hypocrisy could endanger all Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Progressive Majority PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter \-- California law protects reproductive freedom by requiring that private insurance plans cover abortions. The Trump administration just gave California 30 days to change its laws or else it would start pulling funding to the state. Trump is making it easier for insurance companies to get away with not covering reproductive care. At the same time, he's making it harder for insurers that want to provide abortion coverage to do so. His administration unveiled a new billing rule in December designed to make it more expensive for private insurers to cover abortions. According to _The Washington Post_ , the Trump administration wants their threats against Californians to "serve as a warning to other states" who might get in the way of Trump's far-right agenda. We need to know where you stand on Trump and his threats today if we want any hope of winning in November: | | **Do you approve of Donald Trump?**

name: Dan
subject: Did you catch our ad?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
I've known Gary for more than 10 years now, and from day one I could tell he was the kind of person who truly embodies the spirit of service.
| |
---
Friend: I've known Gary for more than 10 years now, and from day one I could tell he was the kind of person who truly embodies the spirit of service.

He's spent his life putting Michigan and our country before himself, whether through his military service, his dedication to defending the Great Lakes or his willingness to work with anyone to help our state.

**I wanted to make sure you had a chance to see our first TV ad of the cycle - it just started running statewide today. [Click here to watch, and if you like what you see, consider chipping in $3 to help us reach more people with Gary's story.](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email_tv-ad-colleen?refcode=jtk311-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**
[](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email_tv-ad-colleen?refcode=jtk311-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
[Donate](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email_tv-ad-colleen?refcode=jtk311-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
Thanks,

Dan
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Colleen Peters
Date: Fri, Feb 7, 2020
Subject: About our first ad

| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9e9/5721a3ed/70f78f71/efb7bb2/92110657/VEsC/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Hi friend,

When I talk to folks about my husband Gary, they're usually surprised to find out that he was a Lt. Commander in the Navy Reserve - and signed up _again_ after 9/11.

**But people who know Gary aren 't surprised. They know that he's always put service before himself - it's just in his DNA. It's why non-partisan groups have ranked him as one of the most effective senators. And it's what drives him every day in Washington when he's fighting for Michigan. **

That's what I love about Gary. He's always thinking about how he can do more for working families, more for our troops and veterans, more for Michiganders. And that's what our first TV ad is all about.
Since you're reading this email, I know you're one of Gary's strongest supporters, friend. That's why I wanted to give you a sneak peek of our first ad of the cycle - it talks all about Gary's record of fighting for our state, and I think you're really gonna like it.

[**You 'll see our ad live if you're watching the Michigan vs. Michigan State game tomorrow, but you can also click here to check it out before anyone else.**](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email_tv-ad-colleen?refcode=jtk311-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
[](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email_tv-ad-colleen?refcode=jtk311-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
I'm so excited for the rest of Michigan to see what I already know: Gary is one of the hardest-working senators because he truly cares about doing the work it takes for Michigan families.

Thanks for your support - it truly means the world to Gary and me.

\- Colleen [Contribute](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email_tv-ad-colleen?refcode=jtk311-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")

clean_body: I've known Gary for more than 10 years now, and from day one I could tell he was the kind of person who truly embodies the spirit of service. | | Friend: I've known Gary for more than 10 years now, and from day one I could tell he was the kind of person who truly embodies the spirit of service. He's spent his life putting Michigan and our country before himself, whether through his military service, his dedication to defending the Great Lakes or his willingness to work with anyone to help our state. I wanted to make sure you had a chance to see our first TV ad of the cycle - it just started running statewide today. "" "" "" Thanks, Dan \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Colleen Peters Date: Fri, Feb 7, 2020 Subject: About our first ad | | | "" Hi friend, When I talk to folks about my husband Gary, they're usually surprised to find out that he was a Lt. Commander in the Navy Reserve - and signed up again after 9/11. But people who know Gary aren 't surprised. They know that he's always put service before himself - it's just in his DNA. It's why non-partisan groups have ranked him as one of the most effective senators. And it's what drives him every day in Washington when he's fighting for Michigan. That's what I love about Gary. He's always thinking about how he can do more for working families, more for our troops and veterans, more for Michiganders. And that's what our first TV ad is all about. Since you're reading this email, I know you're one of Gary's strongest supporters, friend. That's why I wanted to give you a sneak peek of our first ad of the cycle - it talks all about Gary's record of fighting for our state, and I think you're really gonna like it. "" "" I'm so excited for the rest of Michigan to see what I already know: Gary is one of the hardest-working senators because he truly cares about doing the work it takes for Michigan families. Thanks for your support - it truly means the world to Gary and me. \- Colleen "" | "" PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan Po Box 32072 Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day.
