name: UPDATE via Bennet for America
subject: News roundup (some good, some bad)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Happy Saturday, Team - we've got a news roundup to start off the weekend:

[The Good News:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa90/134673f2/37efe14d/69973dfd/1219608921/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B2_020820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") Overnight, we passed the 70% mark of our $100,000 goal!

[The Bad News:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa90/134673f2/37efe14d/69973dfd/1219608921/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B2_020820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") We've only got three days to close the gap!

Friends, we need your support now more than ever.

The polls have been wrong since day one, and as candidates falter, voters in New Hampshire are looking to Michael. Our campaign is surging in the Granite State!

[If you've been waiting to make a contribution until now, this is the perfect moment.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa90/134673f2/37efe14d/69973dfd/1219608921/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B2_020820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

We've outlasted better-known and better-funded competitors, and with a historic number of voters still undecided ahead of election day, Michael has the opportunity to surprise everyone on Tuesday.

But we can't succeed without your support.

[Can you rush a contribution of any amount right now? Every dollar goes a long way to helping us fund our final turnout operations!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaa90/134673f2/37efe14d/69973dfd/1219608921/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B2_020820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Booker for Senate
subject: Why we need to re-elect Cory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | |
---
| The stakes are high. Team, Earlier this week on the Senate floor, Cory cast one of the biggest votes of his career. **He voted to convict the President of the United States and remove him from office.** The outcome of the impeachment trial was disappointing -- it's clearer than ever before that we need Cory's strong and principled leadership in Washington. He's going to keep fighting for us and standing up to the likes of Mitch McConnell and Republicans in Congress who choose to look the other way at this President's misconduct. **Five Republican candidates are already vying for Cory 's seat. Let's show them that Cory is here to stay by helping him get re-elected:** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200208_BFS_20200208-fr-BFS-EM1-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200208_BFS_20200208-fr-BFS-EM1-actives_actives_express10&amount=10&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200208_BFS_20200208-fr-BFS-EM1-actives_actives_express50&amount=50&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200208_BFS_20200208-fr-BFS-EM1-actives_actives_express100&amount=100&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200208_BFS_20200208-fr-BFS-EM1-actives_actives_expressother&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---

Donald Trump may not have been removed from office, but he's still going to have contend with tough leaders in the Senate who'll hold him accountable -- leaders like Cory.
**It should be no surprise then that a bunch of the President 's supporters are campaigning right now against Cory in an attempt to win his Senate seat.**
**[We have the ability to stop them in their tracks. There's no way we're going to stand by quietly as Donald Trump's allies try to take this Senate seat. Chip in today to support Cory's re-election.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200208_BFS_20200208-fr-BFS-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
It's our job to make sure Cory returns to the Senate for another term next year.
The stakes are high.
Team Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200208_BFS_20200208-fr-BFS-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fbe/5fca0d19/7a107915/291d0d5b/2008128240/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fbe/5fca0d19/7a107915/291d0d5a/2008128240/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fbe/5fca0d19/7a107915/291d0d59/2008128240/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fbe/5fca0d19/7a107915/291d0d58/2008128240/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/unsubscribe").

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: We've had enough of Susan Collins' "political theater." If you have too, chip in whatever you can afford to defeat her now.
body:
It's just an excuse.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580293a/4bef7a87/6d50953e/287fbd46/2848325263/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends, no one is buying Senator Collins' claim that Trump learned his lesson from impeachment. Just listen to CNN's Jeffrey Toobin:
_"The idea that anyone could think that this president was gonna change his behavior one iota, becuase of what went on in the Senate is an embarassment."_
Can anyone really believe Senator Collins' defense? Trump himself said he hasn't learned a thing! She just needed political cover to justify her vote.
Well, we've had enough of Senator Collins' political theater. Have you?
[**Make a $3 contribution to defeat Susan Collins and elect Sara Gideon to the United States Senate.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580293a/4bef7a87/6d50953e/287fbd45/2848325263/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDgtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200208-2-full")
This grassroots team is growing bigger and stronger by the day. It's clear that Americans are ready to replace Susan Collins in the Senate and kick Mitch McConnell out as Majority Leader.
Thanks for your fight,
Team Sara
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580293a/4bef7a87/6d50953e/287fbd45/2848325263/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDgtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200208-2-full")**********

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine

South Freeport, ME 04078

subject: We can't let them win.

Friend, Last night, **we saw exactly why we must not let the Democrats win this fall.** With the party centering around Bernie Sanders' socialist philosophy, there is not a single Democrat running for president that we can trust to run our government. If Bernie and the radical left get their way, **our taxes will skyrocket, our private healthcare system will be dissolved, and our southern border will be left completely defenseless.** To make matters worse, **the results of these policies will bankrupt our economy and cost our taxpayers ' trillions of dollars. The price tag of the Sanders Socialist Agenda is simply too expensive for our country to buy into.** If we're going to stop this socialist plot from succeeding, we need a leader who will stand beside President Trump and be unafraid to speak the truth. **I 'm running for Congress because I'm unwilling to let the greatest country in the history of the world be hijacked by the radical left. ** [**Will you join my team today and donate $20 or more?**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/JfJrWUbYIluHjKCyNnlzaQ/C5uKIOnhfw0bAYqUNR892MTw) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/JfJrWUbYIluHjKCyNnlzaQ/C5uKIOnhfw0bAYqUNR892MTw) **We cannot afford to let the Democrats take back the White House this fall and undo all of our hard work.[Can we count on you to help me Keep America Great by donating $20 right now?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/JfJrWUbYIluHjKCyNnlzaQ/C5uKIOnhfw0bAYqUNR892MTw)** The Democrats aren't afraid to show the country where they stand and neither should we. \- Chris

name: Mike Bloomberg
subject: When I'm president, we'll do more for our veterans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
My plan will get it done.

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=077ecf7af7474466bb4b0844eb65bd8b&_e=ll8Ubauc0b5yIrEhDC6_WxlPjbg6aUdVDGiFqLSwjDb5CsU778_UNGduu5anD7xpCu8nOlWFU0IBmiULGM8Ml9kLpg6vcfWUqItM3KR-ei5r83ck6Bmv6-Z1nb6ibtBQ7ZgfNFiS-jwXddywfDe6Vy_7Izq2v5RHsvYffnJriaORysL7XoEIuUj4SvaItCPYWR0boexxCWzk-5FK2Wf5n_YJqUtqIG0N-vtaJWcN4npoRMp5B1Vcg7pMdUSCHZcE9h1-b0G5Dnxl3rUpJARNNKcq8c6Ryb2Fyb-oidPVgsa3Ip32AYOr0TOWifIgADJt) As Americans, we owe a great debt to the men and women who are veterans of our armed services. President Trump promised to honor them -- but he has broken that promise, like he has so many others. The reality is, he has done nothing to fix what's broken in the VA or provide our veterans with the support and resources they need. As president, I will change that. That's why, yesterday, I released more of my plan to ensure economic security, quality health care, and other support opportunities for veterans. This includes:
* Combating homelessness and suicide
* Providing veterans with the skills they need to fill critical jobs
* Creating a pathway to success in business and in the corporate world.
* Creating a more diverse fighting force from top to bottom, by facilitating military-career advancement for women, immigrants, and members of the LGBTQ+ community.

[**I hope you'll add your name in support of my plan to support veterans and their families by providing the resources they need to succeed in and out of uniform.**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=077ecf7af7474466bb4b0844eb65bd8b&_e=ll8Ubauc0b5yIrEhDC6_WxlPjbg6aUdVDGiFqLSwjDb5CsU778_UNGduu5anD7xpCu8nOlWFU0IBmiULGM8Ml9kLpg6vcfWUqItM3KR-ei7hVe5kkUrNZRlpkPE-WjFAOqcAv_J1ywMg3ZQCZ1iHRm1Ar1Og0mtMqslrxWHvrkwGznxKlB_57VSA1lLXNVPQb652tDb8bfjVmx1Q79g8HtaO1M9WaKTec1JOF0HYZXrkqYxmbdUacKFqDlJmOpbSm-gmPpK1QNH8RoB2kthvka7BAyoaGt_W3iNzUHi6e-5r_Ce6l4Pgtl6ix_HVHRpq) The plan I released yesterday builds off of the commitment I made to veterans last month when I released a number of policies that will help veterans manage their transition to the civilian workforce -- by providing training, working with them to find good-paying jobs that take advantage of the skills they've acquired in the military, and helping entrepreneurs get their businesses off the ground. Our veterans have answered the call of duty time and again. They've won world wars, helped to spread and defend democracy around the globe, and kept us free and safe. Our service members in uniform today continue this tradition. That so many feel marginalized, undervalued -- or worse, forgotten altogether -- is one of our great failures as a country. It's time to right that wrong once and for all. [**Please, add your name today.**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=077ecf7af7474466bb4b0844eb65bd8b&_e=ll8Ubauc0b5yIrEhDC6_WxlPjbg6aUdVDGiFqLSwjDb5CsU778_UNGduu5anD7xpCu8nOlWFU0IBmiULGM8Ml9kLpg6vcfWUqItM3KR-ei5rJCih7ykES1AzDapiIgSr6n4IvA8aeAjC_N8ivo84RWiM0HRoZJ4_DUCBzvBqseewfIueT2ccBD-NWf2rdJMb3z0MWifwRB6d0BxdifemywKmSWOd2aAs0zl0uj_UoHBzdCaAvw13cTyVFrIvWlYktIU5umLWUFT-8K7z6QVZV5aWeO_23k9S2zdEiqNwfNHP1L-PX8RvKi00ETMeWopv) Thank you for your support -- and for being a part of Team Bloomberg, Mike Bloomberg | [SIGN ON NOW »](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=077ecf7af7474466bb4b0844eb65bd8b&_e=ll8Ubauc0b5yIrEhDC6_WxlPjbg6aUdVDGiFqLSwjDb5CsU778_UNGduu5anD7xpCu8nOlWFU0IBmiULGM8Ml9kLpg6vcfWUqItM3KR-ei6K_RxbRadZU22ixpON8bKzdv0xm9XlCgS0dr0O4HZm9SkaMuRSX4tCaElX9kxgAEgqxGYbd7zsFHvBFBfLLOfe6G6fgFoKwXqNuTVrnGATx9J27Miz0xCVgz4j8vlvWn0Hn0nTzbyTUC57eb2CrbER1tlt2pfgU2lQqEJcXp68bnEovQwmWR9hFqg6j2mtuvHPXdm9-uYSl2zrMqTAh3hN)

clean_body: My plan will get it done. | As Americans, we owe a great debt to the men and women who are veterans of our armed services. President Trump promised to honor them -- but he has broken that promise, like he has so many others. The reality is, he has done nothing to fix what's broken in the VA or provide our veterans with the support and resources they need. As president, I will change that. That's why, yesterday, I released more of my plan to ensure economic security, quality health care, and other support opportunities for veterans. This includes: Combating homelessness and suicide Providing veterans with the skills they need to fill critical jobs Creating a pathway to success in business and in the corporate world. Creating a more diverse fighting force from top to bottom, by facilitating military-career advancement for women, immigrants, and members of the LGBTQ+ community. The plan I released yesterday builds off of the commitment I made to veterans last month when I released a number of policies that will help veterans manage their transition to the civilian workforce -- by providing training, working with them to find good-paying jobs that take advantage of the skills they've acquired in the military, and helping entrepreneurs get their businesses off the ground. Our veterans have answered the call of duty time and again. They've won world wars, helped to spread and defend democracy around the globe, and kept us free and safe. Our service members in uniform today continue this tradition. That so many feel marginalized, undervalued -- or worse, forgotten altogether -- is one of our great failures as a country. It's time to right that wrong once and for all. Thank you for your support -- and for being a part of Team Bloomberg, Mike Bloomberg | | | | ---|---|--- . name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Side by side, we're building a grassroots movement to beat the most corrupt president in American history and root out the corruption that got him to the White House in the first place. We're going... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ad47/45c30650/1f890b694/66e23d19/663980187/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
As I left the debate stage last night, I was feeling deeply grateful for everything you do as a member of this team.

Side by side, we're building a grassroots movement to beat the most corrupt president in American history and root out the corruption that got him to the White House in the first place.

We're going to make big, structural change. That means ending the influence of money on campaigns and overturning _Citizens United_. That means ending the filibuster and taking power away from the gun industry. That means an Ultra-Millionaire Tax and expanding Social Security, investing in public schools, and providing child care for every baby.

It means taking control of our government away from the giant corporations and billionaires and putting it in the hands of the people.

There's a lot to do. But I've spent my career fighting for working people, and I know how to win -- and I know I have this grassroots movement with me every step of the way. Together, we can unite the party, win this primary, and win in November.

**Our next big task is hitting our fundraising goal before the New Hampshire primary on Tuesday. I'm not going to turn to a Super PAC or call a handful of wealthy donors to help hit this goal, so I'm asking you:**

**[Can I count on you to make your first donation right now to help reach this powerfully important goal? I can't do this without your help, and I wouldn't want to.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ad47/45c30650/1f890b694/66e23d18/663980187/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU80NUZfREVCX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwMjA4X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO45F_DEB_EWD_E_20200208_V1S1_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

clean_body: Side by side, we're building a grassroots movement to beat the most corrupt president in American history and root out the corruption that got him to the White House in the first place. We're going... | | | "" As I left the debate stage last night, I was feeling deeply grateful for everything you do as a member of this team. Side by side, we're building a grassroots movement to beat the most corrupt president in American history and root out the corruption that got him to the White House in the first place. We're going to make big, structural change. That means ending the influence of money on campaigns and overturning Citizens United. That means ending the filibuster and taking power away from the gun industry. That means an Ultra-Millionaire Tax and expanding Social Security, investing in public schools, and providing child care for every baby. It means taking control of our government away from the giant corporations and billionaires and putting it in the hands of the people. There's a lot to do. But I've spent my career fighting for working people, and I know how to win -- and I know I have this grassroots movement with me every step of the way. Together, we can unite the party, win this primary, and win in November. Our next big task is hitting our fundraising goal before the New Hampshire primary on Tuesday. I'm not going to turn to a Super PAC or call a handful of wealthy donors to help hit this goal, so I'm asking you: "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117
